task_completion.description: Verify the Target List name is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Q1 2025 Enterprise Outreach' in the 'Name' input field during creation, or displayed as the title in the saved Target List detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the Target List type is set to Default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Type' dropdown menu showing 'Default' during creation, or the Type field displaying 'Default' in the saved detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the Target List description is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Target list for Q1 2025 product launch campaign targeting key enterprise client contacts' in the Description text area or the saved detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the Target List was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SuiteCRM detail view of the Target List, which typically displays the list's details as static text along with action buttons like 'Edit', 'Duplicate', and 'Delete' at the top.

task_completion.description: Verify Margaret Chen is added to the Target List.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'Margaret Chen' listed under the 'Contacts' subpanel at the bottom of the Target List detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify David Rodriguez is added to the Target List.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'David Rodriguez' listed under the 'Contacts' subpanel at the bottom of the Target List detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify Sarah Williams is added to the Target List.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'Sarah Williams' listed under the 'Contacts' subpanel at the bottom of the Target List detail view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SuiteCRM web application in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the contacts were actually linked using the CRM's functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contacts should appear in the structured 'Contacts' subpanel of the Target List, not just typed into the description or a separate text file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel should not be open or visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Target List Name: 'Q1 2025 Enterprise Outreach'. Expected Type: 'Default'. Expected Description must contain: 'Q1 2025 product launch'. Expected Contacts to be linked in the subpanel: Margaret Chen, David Rodriguez, and Sarah Williams.
